summary: Completed E2E testing of PlayXBets manual wallet system. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for user wallet/deposit/withdrawal pages and admin deposit/withdrawal management pages.

minor.issue: Rate limit of 2 minutes between withdrawal requests may cause test failures when running multiple withdrawal tests in sequence

seed_data_creation: Created test deposits and withdrawals during E2E testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wallet system fully tested. Key findings: (1) GET /api/wallet returns balance, available_balance, frozen_balance, exposure. available_balance = balance - frozen_balance - exposure. (2) POST /api/deposits creates pending deposit request. (3) POST /api/admin/deposits/{id}/approve adds amount to user balance. (4) POST /api/admin/deposits/{id}/reject does not change balance. (5) POST /api/withdrawals creates pending withdrawal and freezes amount (increases frozen_balance, decreases available_balance). (6) PUT /api/admin/withdrawals/{id} with status=approved deducts from balance and releases frozen. (7) PUT /api/admin/withdrawals/{id} with status=rejected releases frozen back to available. (8) Frontend routes: /user/recharges (wallet + deposit form), /user/withdrawals (withdrawal history), /admin/deposits (approve/reject deposits), /admin/withdrawals (approve/reject withdrawals). (9) All data-testid attributes present for testing.

get_wallet.details: GET /api/wallet returns balance, available_balance, frozen_balance, exposure

create_deposit.details: POST /api/deposits with amount, payment_method, transaction_ref creates pending deposit

admin_get_deposits.details: GET /api/admin/deposits returns all deposits with username attached

admin_approve_deposit.details: POST /api/admin/deposits/{id}/approve adds amount to user balance

admin_reject_deposit.details: POST /api/admin/deposits/{id}/reject marks as rejected, balance unchanged

create_withdrawal.details: POST /api/withdrawals with amount + bank details freezes amount

admin_get_withdrawals.details: GET /api/admin/withdrawals returns all withdrawals with bank details

admin_approve_withdrawal.details: PUT /api/admin/withdrawals/{id} with status=approved deducts balance and releases frozen

admin_reject_withdrawal.details: PUT /api/admin/withdrawals/{id} with status=rejected releases frozen back to available

admin_wallet_stats.details: GET /api/admin/wallet/stats returns total_deposits, total_withdrawals, pending counts, user balances

frontend_user_recharges.details: /user/recharges shows wallet balance card, deposit/withdraw buttons, deposit form, history tabs

frontend_user_withdrawals.details: /user/withdrawals shows withdrawal history with status badges and bank details

frontend_admin_deposits.details: /admin/deposits shows stats, filters, deposit table with approve/reject buttons

frontend_admin_withdrawals.details: /admin/withdrawals shows stats, filters, withdrawal cards with bank details and approve/reject buttons

homepage.details: Homepage loads with cricket matches, login/signup buttons

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints use real data from MongoDB

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/user_recharges_page.png - User wallet page with balance card
.screenshots/deposit_form_filled.png - Deposit form with amount and payment method
.screenshots/admin_deposits_page.png - Admin deposits with stats and table
.screenshots/admin_pending_deposits.png - Admin pending deposits with approve/reject buttons
